titleStmt.title: SII 6.240: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 240. (A.R. No. 265-B of 1897). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
